description: This file implements a build and workflow service for managing build records, including creation, retrieval, status updates, cancellation, and document linking, with support for different persistence backends.

methods.name: isDbConfiguredForBuilds
methods.description: Checks if the database is configured for build persistence.

methods.name: createBuild
methods.description: Creates a new build and workflow, starts simulation, and persists the build record.

methods.name: getBuild
methods.description: Retrieves a build record by ID, with a best-effort sync from workflow state.

methods.name: getBuildStatus
methods.description: Returns the current status of a build, using workflow as the source of truth.

methods.name: cancelBuild
methods.description: Cancels an in-progress build and updates its status.

methods.name: linkDocumentToBuild
methods.description: Links a single document to a build if supported by the repository.

methods.name: linkDocumentsToBuild
methods.description: Links multiple documents to a build if supported by the repository.
